# New-assignment workflow

This SKILL documents the workflow the agent follows when creating or updating an assignment in the repository.

Workflow summary:

- Validate assignment folder structure matches repository standards.
- Populate README using `templates/assignment-template.md`.
- Add starter files and sample data where needed.
- Register new assignment by calling `scripts/update-config.js`.
- Attach additional assets using `scripts/add-attachment.js`.

Use this file as a lightweight guide for automated agents and maintainers.
